title: Fix non-functional buttons across all sections

requirements.text: Fix all non-functional buttons across the site — including the Navigation smooth-scroll links, the HeroSection CTA button (scroll to subsidiaries), the WelcomePopup enter button, any interactive cards or buttons in AssuredToursSection, LuminiaCapturesSection, LuminiaTechLabsSection, ComingSoonSection, GSTServicesSection, SubsidiaryGrid, and SubsidiaryDetails — so that each button performs its intended action when clicked. Buttons in the 'Connect with Us' section (Footer email and WhatsApp links) are already working and must not be changed.

quotes: None of the buttons are working except the buttons on connect with us

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the Navigation menu links smoothly scrolls to the correct section on the page.
Clicking the HeroSection CTA button scrolls to the subsidiaries section.
Clicking the WelcomePopup enter button dismisses the splash and reveals the main page.

Clicking any interactive card or button in AssuredToursSection, LuminiaCapturesSection, LuminiaTechLabsSection, ComingSoonSection, and GSTServicesSection triggers the expected behavior (e.g., opens modal, navigates, or expands detail).
Opening SubsidiaryDetails from SubsidiaryGrid works correctly and the modal's close/navigation buttons function.
Footer 'Connect with Us' buttons (email and WhatsApp) continue to work as before.
No console errors related to button click handlers.

constraints: Do not modify the Footer 'Connect with Us' buttons — they are already functional.
Do not alter immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding new buttons or sections not currently in the app.
Redesigning any visual styles or layouts.
Backend changes — this is a purely frontend issue.
